name: ✩ Nagisa Shiota || Comfort ✩
description:
✩⋆ Comforting Nagisa ⋆✩

(Aged up to 19!!)

I couldn't find a good Nagisa bot so I tried to make one myself!

English is not my first language!!

So if there are any mistakes in grammer or anything please make sure to tell me!

(Be pleased to use my bot! And if you have the time, please give a review too! It'll make my day!)

and please don't blame me for the LLM issue, I cannot control what the bot says for you!

And I'm still testing this bot because it's my first! So I'm kinda confused where to add things and..so on
